name: Pacific Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Make 8 slits in the roast at random intervals.
2. Insert one whole clove garlic into each slit and rub the roast with a mixture of salt and pepper.
3. Lightly coat the bottom of a Dutch oven with oil.
4. Brown the meat well on all sides.
5. Add water and onion; cover and simmer for 2 hours or until tender.
6. Remove the roast to a platter and thicken the gravy by mixing flour with water.
7. Season the gravy with the remaining ingredients (Worchestershire sauce, tomato juice, and salt).
8. Slice the roast and serve with gravy over cooked rice.
